docs.text: Ziqi Zhou（周子奇） M.Eng. student at Department of Computer Science and Technology , Nanjing University , Nanjing, P.R.China, 210023. Email: zhouzq@smail.nju.edu.cn; zqzhou1997@gmail.com; zqzhou1997@outlook.com. Biography Currently, I am a first year master student of Department of Computer Science and Technology in Nanjing University and a member of R&L Group led by Prof. Yang Gao , under the supervision of Associate Prof. Yinghuan Shi . I received my B.Eng. degree in School of Computer Science and Technology in June 2020 from Nanjing Normal University . Main Research Interests Computer Vision Medical Image Analysis Domain Adaptation & Generalization Education Experience 2016/09-2020/06 School of Computer Science and Technology , Nanjing Normal University , Undergraduate student 2020/09-Now Department of Computer Science and Technology , Nanjing University , Master student Preprint Deep Symmetric Adaptation Network for Cross-modality Medical Image Segmentation. Xiaoting Han, Lei Qi, Qian Yu, Ziqi Zhou , Yefeng Zheng, Yinghuan Shi, Yang. arXiv preprint arXiv:2101.06853 , 2021. [ Paper ] Publication "*" indicates the equal contribution Cross-Modal Attention-Guided Convolutional Network for Multi-Modal Cardiac Segmentation. Ziqi Zhou *, Xinna Guo*, Wanqi Yang, Yinghuan Shi, Luping Zhou, Lei Wang, Ming Yang. Machine Learning in Medical Imaging @ MICCAI ( MLMI ), 2019. [ Paper ] Correspondence Email: zhouzq@smail.nju.edu.cn; zqzhou1997@gmail.com; zqzhou1997@outlook.com Office: Room 428, Computer Science Building, Xianlin Campus of Nanjing University Address: State Key Laboratory for Novel Software Technology Nanjing University, Xianlin Campus No.163 Xianlin Avenue, Qixia District, Nanjing 210023, China
